title: Amalgamator
description:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its "face" is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

"One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let's get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!"
conditions: All players must have at least 2 basic Strike cards in their deck
All players must have at least 2 basic Defend cards in their deck
notes: When you choose either option, the game prompts you to select which 2 Strike or Defend cards to remove. The chosen cards are removed from your deck and replaced with a single upgraded Ultimate card. The event then displays completion text showing the Amalgamator striking its Bone Anvil as you gain your new technique.
